member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinDataExporter
member.summary: This class is responsible for exporting the binning data into Shared Storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinDataExporter.ExportBinData(System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String)
member.summary: Exports Interface, Functional and Data Bin results into Shared Storage for External Consumption.
member.param: The data bin from which to export all bin data.
An optional prefix for all Shared Storage Keys.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner
member.summary: This class is responsible for storing data related to the bin selected by one of the bin checkers as well as providing functionality related to such bin data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets the binner exit port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.SetFinalPort(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the final port number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.SetDataBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sets the data bin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.SetInstanceName(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the instance name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.ApplyTesterBin
member.summary: Applies the data bin in the tester.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.CheckBin
member.summary: Prints Checkbin value to console.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.LogBinResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationKey})
member.summary: Logs bin results into ituff.
member.param: The configuration keys to log when there is no matching die configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner.ExportBinData(System.String)
member.summary: Exports Bin Data results for External Consumption.
member.param: An optional prefix for all Shared Storage Keys.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.AlarmBinChecker
member.summary: Checks current tester bin to see if a an Alarm Bin was set which should have priority over any other bin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.AlarmBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.AlarmBinChecker.CheckForAlarmBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Checks if current bin is an alarm bin.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BadDieBinChecker
member.summary: Checks if conditions exist in BinTrace Data to set a Bad Bin and if true returns the bin data to set.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BadDieBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BadDieBinChecker.ComputeBadDieBin(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData)
member.summary: Executes the Bad Die Binning Algorithm and attempts to compute a bad die bin.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BadDieBinChecker.IsSubstringContainedInStoredSubflow(System.String)
member.summary: Indicates whether a substring is contained in the currently stored Subflow name. This typically indicates what type of subflow it was based on the particular substring.
member.returns: True if the subString is present in the Subflow name, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations
member.summary: This class contains methods which perform operations on bin numbers needed to execute the main binning algorithms.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.GetHardBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the hardbin digits from a given 7-8 digit bin.
member.param: The bin from which to get the hardbin from.
member.returns: The calculated hardbin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.GetFunctionalBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the Functional Bin digits from a given 7-8 digit bin.
member.param: The bin from which to get the fbin from.
member.returns: The calculated fbin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.GetLastTwoDigitsOfFunctionalBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the last two digits of the Functional Bin from a 7-8 digit bin.
member.param: The bin from which to get the last two digits of the fbin from.
member.returns: The last two digits of the fbin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.IsBinFailBin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Determines whether a given bin is a failing bin. If the Hardbin is equal to or greater than 7 it is a fail bin, otherwise it is a pass bin.
member.param: The bin to check for failing criteria.
member.returns: True if the bin is a fail bin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.GetHardbinFromFbin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the hardbin digits from a 4-digit functional Bin.
member.param: The functional bin from which to calculate the hardbin.
member.returns: The calculated hardbin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.CalculateDbinFromFbin(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Calculates an 8-digit Dbin from the fBin.
member.param: The fBin from which to calculate the fail bin from.
member.returns: The calculated fail bin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.CorrectBinForBin26(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Corrects a bin number to account for condition WASBIN26 == true.
member.returns: The corrected bin value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.ValidateNumberOfDigits(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Validates that a bin number has between 7 to 8 digits.
member.param: The bin number to get the number of digits from.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.BinOperations.GetNumberOfDigits(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the number of digits in a bin number or a bin exclusion.
member.param: The bin number from which to get the number of digits.
member.returns: The number of digits in the bin number.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.ConfigurationDataFunctions
member.summary: This class contains helper methods to operate on Configuration File data in order to perform tasks relevant to the Binning Algorithm.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.ConfigurationDataFunctions.NoValidBinAssignmentFound
member.summary: Value to return when no valid bin assignment is found.
Gets the Bin number from the first GoodDieBinAssignment from the configuration file which contains all valid configurations.
member.param: The list of good die bin assignments from the configuration file.
The keys from the configuration file from which to get the current configuration values in storage.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The Bin value from the first GoodDieBinAssignment which has all valid configurations.

member.summary: Gets the Bin number from the first InvalidConfigurationBinAssignment from the configuration file which contains all valid configurations.
member.param: The list of invalid configuration bin assignments from the configuration file.
The keys from the configuration file from which to get the current configuration values in storage.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The Bin value from the first InvalidConfigurationBinAssignment which has all valid configurations.

member.summary: Gets the Bin number from the first BinOverride from the configuration file which contains all valid configurations.
member.param: The list of bin override assignments from the configuration file.
The keys from the configuration file from which to get the current configuration values in storage.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The Bin value from the first BinOverride which has all valid configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.ConfigurationDataFunctions.IsBinExcluded(System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.UInt32})
member.summary: Determines if a bin is excluded. A bin number will be considered excluded if at least one item of the bin exclusions has all of its digits equal to the same amount of first digits of the bin being evaluated. For example bin "12345678" will be considered excluded if binExclusions contains an item with value "12".
member.param: The bin number to check for exclusion.
member.returns: True if the bin is excluded, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.ConfigurationDataFunctions.IsBinExclusionApplicable(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Determines if a bin exclusion is applicable in order to be evaluated for a specific bin. In order for a bin exclusion to be applicable, the number of digits in the exclusion and bin number must both be even or must both be odd. The method will return false if the number of digits in the exclusion is even and the number of digits in the bin is odd or vice-versa.
member.returns: True if the bin exclusion can be evaluated, false otherwise.

member.summary: Generic implementation to get the bin number from any type of bin assignment which has all valid configurations.
Checks if all configurations provided are valid. An individual configuration is considered valid if its value matches the current value in storage from the configuration key of the same name.

Checks if the configuration element is valid against the configuration values in storage. A configuration is considered valid if its value matches the current value in storage from the configuration key of the same name.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.GoodDieBinChecker
member.summary: Checks configuration conditions to determine which Good Bin should be set and returns the bin data to set.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.GoodDieBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.GoodDieBinChecker.ComputeGoodDieBin(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData)
member.summary: Executes the Good Die Binning Algorithm and attempts to compute a good die bin.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.GoodDieBinChecker.ValidateCurrentBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.UInt32})
member.summary: Checks that when we start Good Die Binning the current bin is 69 as it should not have been modified if Bad Die Binning did not find a bad bin. The only exception to current bin being different than 69 is if it's excluded in the configuration file. If these conditions are not met the exit port is set to Fail Port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.GoodDieBinChecker.CheckForVadtl
member.summary: Runs checks for Vadtl conditions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.GoodDieBinChecker.CheckForHvqkStressFail(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Runs checks for HVQK stress fail.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.GoodDieBinChecker.CheckForHvqkStressFailForBinOverride(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Runs checks for HVQK stress fail when a Bin Override needs to be applied.
member.param: Dbin to override the good die bin with.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.InvalidConfigurationBinChecker
member.summary: Checks configuration conditions to see if an Invalid Configuration is applicable and if true returns the bin data to set.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The list of invalid configuration assignments from the configuration file.
The configuration keys from the configuration file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.InvalidConfigurationBinChecker.ComputeInvalidConfigurationBin
member.summary: Checks if an Invalid Configuration Bin Assignment has all valid configurations, and if so, returns the bin data to set.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.TesterApiBinningFunctions
member.summary: This class contains methods which perform operations that partially rely on the use of tester APIs related to Binning provided by the BinCounter Service.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.TesterApiBinningFunctions.ProcessTesterBin(System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Processes a specific bin in order to set it. If the bin does not exist, a dynamic bin is created before setting it.
member.param: The bin to be processed and set.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.TesterApiBinningFunctions.IsCurrentBin69(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Determines if the bin currently set on the ATE Tester is bin 69.
member.returns: True if the current bin is 69, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.TesterApiBinningFunctions.IsCurrentBinExcluded(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.UInt32},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Determines if the bin currently set on the ATE Tester is excluded by the bin exclusions in the configuration file.
member.returns: True if the current bin is excluded, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.TesterApiBinningFunctions.GetBinNameFromId(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.BinningAlgorithm.TesterApiBinningFunctions.BinType,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the bin name from a particular bin id.
member.param: Whether the bin is a hardbin or a softbin.
member.returns: The name for the bin id.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.BinAssignment
member.summary: Base class to represent any type of configuration-based bin assignment.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.BinAssignment.BinValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bin value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.BinAssignment.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bin Assignment Configurations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.BinOverrideAssignment
member.summary: This class represents a BinOverrideAssignment element in the json configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.BinOverrideAssignment.BinValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the bin value to override with.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.BinOverrideAssignment.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bin Override Configurations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData
member.summary: This class represents the data contents of the SortBinCalculator json configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData.IbinHierarchy
member.summary: Gets or sets the Interface Bin Hierarchy.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData.SubflowList
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of Subflows.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData.ConfigurationKeys
member.summary: Gets or sets the storage Keys for all Good and Bad Die configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData.BinOverrides
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bin Overrides.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData.GoodDieBinAssignments
member.summary: Gets or sets the Good Die Bin Assignments.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData.InvalidConfigurationBinAssignments
member.summary: Gets or sets the Invalid Configuration Bin Assignments.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData.BinExclusions
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bin Exclusions.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileParser
member.summary: This class is in charge of parsing the configuration file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileParser.ParseConfigurationFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Parses the configuration file for the Test Method.
member.returns: The parsed configuration file data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationKey
member.summary: This class represents a Configuration Key element in the json configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationKey.ConfigurationName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Configuration Name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationKey.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the Key.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationValidator
member.summary: This class is in charge of performing Verify checks on the configuration file data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationValidator.Verify(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationFileData)
member.summary: Main verification method for configuration data.
member.param: Object representing the configuration file data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationValidator.ValidateIBinHierarchy(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Validates the interface bin hierarchy values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationValidator.ValidateSubflowList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Validates the Subflow List of the configuration file.
member.param: The Subflow list from the configuration file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationValidator.ValidateBinAssignments``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationKey})
member.summary: Validates the bin assignments for any type of configuration-based bin assignments.
member.param: The configuration definitions from the ConfigurationKeys section.

member.summary: Validates that all good/bad die configuration names are defined in the ConfigurationKeys section of the configuration file.
member.param: The good or bad die configurations.
The configuration definitions from the ConfigurationKeys section.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.DieConfiguration
member.summary: This class represents a Good or Bad Die configuration element in the json configuration file.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Configuration Name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.DieConfiguration.ConfigurationValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the Configuration Value.

member.summary: This class represents a GoodDieBinAssignment element in the json configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.GoodDieBinAssignment.BinValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the bin value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.GoodDieBinAssignment.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets the Good Die Configurations.

member.summary: This class represents an InvalidConfigurationBinAssignment element in the json configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.InvalidConfigurationBinAssignment.BinValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the bin value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.InvalidConfigurationBinAssignment.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets the Invalid Configurations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort
member.summary: Represents the exit port for the Test Method and whether it holds a final port value for purposes of flow control.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.FailPort
member.summary: Port value definition for Fail Port.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.ValidPassPort
member.summary: Port value definition for Valid GoodDie/Pass Port.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.ValidBadDiePort
member.summary: Port value definition for Valid Bad Die Port.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.RerouteToHvqkFlowsPort
member.summary: Port value definition for Reroute to HVQK Flows Port.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.UnassignedBinPort
member.summary: Port value definition for Unassigned Bin Port.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.NoMatchingDieConfigurationPort
member.summary: Port value definition for No Matching Die Configuration Port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.SetFinalPort(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the final port number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.GetPortNumber
member.summary: Gets the port number value.
member.returns: The port number value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ExitPort.IsFinalPort
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the port number is final.
member.returns: True if the port number is final, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ItuffLogger
member.summary: This class is responsible for logging the binning data into ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ItuffLogger.LogBadDieBin(System.UInt32,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logs bad die bin results into ituff.
member.param: The name of the instance that failed with the selected bad bin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ItuffLogger.LogGoodDieBin(System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logs good die bin results into ituff.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ItuffLogger.LogNoMatchingDieConfiguration(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationKey},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logs info for when no matching die configuration is found into ituff.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ItuffLogger.GetStatusTokenValues(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the values for Status Tokens as a string with each value separated by an underscore. The order of Status Tokens in the string is as follows: "ISBIN26_WASBIN26_ISVADTL_WASVADTL".
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: StringBuilder with Status Token values separated by underscores.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ItuffLogger.AppendSingleStatusTokenStringValue(System.String,System.Text.StringBuilder,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Appends a single Status Token string value to the string builder that will hold multiple values.
member.param: The name of the status token to append.
The string builder to append the value into.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ItuffLogger.AppendConfigurationKeys(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationKey},System.Text.StringBuilder,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Appends the Configuration Key values to the string builder that will hold the ituff data to log.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys
member.summary: Predefined SharedStorage keys.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.IsBin26StorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for ISBIN26 condition.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.WasBin26StorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for WASBIN26 condition.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.WasVadtlStorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for WASVADTL condition.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.IsVadtlStorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for ISVADTL condition.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.CheckPointBinStorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for Checkpoint output data.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.IsVadtlRecoveryUserStorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for the User Defined Key for the IsVadtlRecovery Token.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.WasVadtlRecoveryUserStorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for the User Defined Key for the WasVadtlRecovery Token.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.SharedStorageKeys.SetBinTestInstanceNameStorageKey
member.summary: Storage Key for printed LogBadDieBin Instance Name. It is use as DeviceEnd filter to selective print FailPinInfo.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.BinTraceStarter
member.summary: Implements the IBinTraceModeExecute interface for BinTrace Mode Start.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.BinTraceStarter.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the BinTrace to start.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.BinTraceStarter.Execute
member.summary: Defines the Execute logic for a BinTrace Starter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.BinTraceStopper
member.summary: Implements the IBinTraceModeExecute interface for BinTrace Mode Stop.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.BinTraceStopper.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.BinTraceStopper.Execute
member.summary: Defines the Execute logic for a BinTrace Starter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.IBinTraceModeExecute
member.summary: Defines an interface for all BinTrace Mode executors to implement.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortBinTrace.IBinTraceModeExecute.Execute
member.summary: Runs the Execute logic for the specific BinTrace Mode.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.BinTraceMode
member.summary: BinTrace modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.BinTraceMode.On
member.summary: Turn On the BinTrace to capture the instances information.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.BinTraceMode.Off
member.summary: Turn Off the BinTrace to stop capturing the instances information.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortBinTraceTestMethod.binTraceModeExecutor
member.summary: The executor for the specific BinTrace Mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortBinTraceTestMethod.BinTraceMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the TM mode. The modes available are On and Off.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortBinTraceTestMethod.BinTraceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bin Trace Name to turn on or off.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod
member.summary: This Test Method determines the final bin in a Sort Test Program but does not set it into the Tester.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.configurationFileData
member.summary: Stores Configuration File Data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.BinStorageKeyPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the BinStorageKeyPrefix.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.Verify
member.summary: Verify implementation for the PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Execute implementation for the PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.
member.returns: Exit port number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckBinTestMethod.LogCheckBin(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner)
member.summary: Logs the final checkbin data and returns the port to exit through.
member.returns: The port number to exit through.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortCheckpoint.CheckpointBinChecker
member.summary: Checks if any valid Bad Die Bin exists in BinTrace Data and if true returns the bin number in a Shared Storage token.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortCheckpoint.CheckpointBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortCheckpoint.CheckpointBinChecker.ComputeCheckpointBadBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Implementation of the Checkpoint functionality. This algorithm traverses the specified BinTrace arrays and finds the first failing bin, prints it and saves it to shared storage.
member.param: The list of BinTrace sub flows to process.
member.returns: The exit port number.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckpointTestMethod
member.summary: This Test Method traverses the specified BinTrace arrays and finds the first failing bin, prints it and saves it to shared storage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckpointTestMethod.BinTracesToCheck
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of BinTracesToCheck.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckpointTestMethod.Verify
member.summary: Verify implementation for the PrimeSortCheckpointTestMethod.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortCheckpointTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Execute implementation for the PrimeSortCheckpointTestMethod.
member.returns: Exit port number.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod
member.summary: This Test Method determines the final bin in a Sort Test Program and sets it into the Tester.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.configurationFileData
member.summary: Stores Configuration File Data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.BinStorageKeyPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the BinStorageKeyPrefix.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.Verify
member.summary: Verify implementation for the PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Execute implementation for the PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.
member.returns: Exit port number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.ApplyBin(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner)
member.summary: Applies the final bin and returns the port to exit through.
member.returns: The port number to exit through.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.LogPresetBin(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner)
member.summary: Logs the final SetBin data when the bin was Preset and returns the port to exit through.
member.returns: The port number to exit through.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortSetBinTestMethod.WriteBinData(Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.Common.Binner)
member.summary: Writes final bin data to ituff file and Shared Storage.
member.returns: The port number to exit through.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.AlarmErrorTBinChecker
member.summary: Checks current bin conditions to see if a Software or Hardware Alarm bin was set and if so sets the appropriate TBin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.AlarmErrorTBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.AlarmErrorTBinChecker.ComputeAlarmErrorTBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt32)
member.summary: Computes the TBin if the current bin was set to a Software or Hardware Alarm Bin.
member.param: The list of Bin Inputs to process.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BadDieTBinChecker
member.summary: Checks Bin Input values for a Bad Die Bin and if one is found sets the TBin accordingly.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BadDieTBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BadDieTBinChecker.ComputeBadDieTBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Computes the TBin if a Bad Bin value is found in the Bin Inputs.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions
member.summary: This class contains methods which perform helper functions on Bin Inputs for the TBin algorithms.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.GetMissingSocketIndex(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the index of the first Missing Socket within the list of Bin Inputs. A Missing Socket will be one for which the Bin Input Token does not exist in the Shared Storage or it's value is zero. The index will be adjusted for mathematical operations, meaning the first item will be index 1.
member.param: The list of Bin Inputs to search the Missing Socket in.
member.returns: The index of the first Missing Socket within the Bin Inputs List.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.GetBadDieSocketIndex(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the index of the first Socket within the list of Bin Inputs which contains a Bad Die Bin. The index will be adjusted for mathematical operations, meaning the first item will be index 1.
member.param: The list of Bin Inputs to search the Missing Socket in.
member.returns: The index of the first Bad Die Socket within the Bin Inputs List.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.ContainsBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Determines whether the Bin Inputs in Shared Storage contain a particular bin value.
member.param: The list of Bin Input tokens to search in Shared Storage.
member.returns: True if the bin to search is equal to one of the bin input values. False otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.GetBinValueFromIndex(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the bin value of the Bin Input in Shared Storage determined by a given index.
member.param: The list fo Bin Input tokens.
The One-Based index of the Bin Input to get the value from.
member.returns: The bin value contained in the indexed Bin Input.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.GetNumberOfExistingFlows(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the number of executed flows. A flow is considered to have executed if there is data in Shared Storage for its given Bin Input token.
member.param: The list fo Bin Input tokens.
member.returns: The number of executed flows.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.GetAllFirstDigits(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the first digits of all Bin Numbers contained in the Bin Inputs as an array of size 6. The size of 6 is the maximum limit for the Bin Inputs list and is validated during Verify. Items that do not exist in the shared storage will return a FirstDigit value of 0. If the bin inputs list contains less than 6 items the missing FirstDigit values will also be 0.
member.param: The list of Bin Inputs from which to get the First Digit.
member.returns: An uint array of size 6 containing the first digits of Bin Input values and zeroes for all missing items.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.GetAllValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets all the bin values for the given Bin Inputs list. If a bin Input does not exist in the Shared Storage a value of zero is returned for that particular Key.
member.param: The list of Bin Inputs from which to get values.
member.returns: A dictionary of bin input names to bin input values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.BinInputsFunctions.ContainsAlarmBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Determines if any of the Bin Inputs in the Shared Storage is an Alarm Bin Value.
member.param: The list of Bin Inputs from which to get values.
member.returns: True if any of the Bin Inputs in Shared Storage is an Alarm Bin, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.CurrentBinTBinChecker
member.summary: Checks current bin conditions to see if the current bin is not equal to one of the Bin Inputs.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.CurrentBinTBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.CurrentBinTBinChecker.CheckCurrentBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt32)
member.summary: Computes the TBin if the current bin is not equal to one of the Bin Inputs.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.GoodDieTBinChecker
member.summary: Computes the appropriate TBin value for a Good Die.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.GoodDieTBinChecker.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Computes the TBin for a Good Die.
member.param: The number of Flows that are expected to have been executed.
member.returns: The Binner object with selected bin data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinItuffLogger
member.summary: This class is responsible for logging the TBin data into ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinItuffLogger.LogTBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt32,System.String,System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logs TBin data into ituff.
member.param: The list of Bin Inputs for which to log their name and values.
The final data TBin that was set into the tester.
A brief description of any found error.
The Tester Bin value before TBin was set.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner
member.summary: This class is responsible for storing data related to the Total Bin (TBin) selected by one of the Tbin checkers as well as providing functionality related to such bin data.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.FailTBin
member.summary: TBin value for error conditions.

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
/// This session context.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets the binner exit port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.SetFinalPort(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the final port number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.SetTBins(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sets the Total data bin, functional bin and interface bin. Functional and interface bins are both derived from the given data bin.
member.param: The Total data bin from which to set all values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.SetErrorDescription(System.String)
member.summary: Sets a description for a port 0 error to be logged.
member.param: A short description of the error that occurred.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.ApplyTesterBin(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt32)
member.summary: Applies the data bin in the tester.
member.param: The list of bin inputs that were processed to set the TBin.
The tester bin number before TBin was set.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.StoreTBinValuesInSharedStorage
member.summary: Stores the TBin values into shared storage so they can be read by the Device End Datalogger.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinner.IsGoodDieBadDieDataTBinValid(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Determines if a Good/Bad Die DTBin value is valid. A Good/Bad Die DTBin is valid if its value is greater than the first Bin Input value.
member.param: The list of bin inputs that were processed to set the TBin.
member.returns: True if the DTBin is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinOperations
member.summary: This class contains methods which perform operations on Tbin numbers.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.SortTBin.TBinOperations.BuildDataTBinForSocketIndex(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Build a DataTBin for a given Socket index and a base bin number. The socket index becomes a prefix for the base bin number.
member.param: The base bin number to build the DataTBin with.
member.returns: The DataTBin number.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod
member.summary: This Test Method determines the total bin in a Sort Test Program and sets it into the Tester.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.SwitchStatus
member.summary: Defines the On/Off options for switch-type parameters.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.SwitchStatus.Off
member.summary: Parameter is off.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.SwitchStatus.On
member.summary: Parameter is on.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.BinInputs
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of Bin Inputs to process.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.ExpectedNumberOfFlows
member.summary: Gets or sets the Expected Number Of Flows.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.DesignKill
member.summary: Gets or sets whether DesignKill is On or Off.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.CostKill
member.summary: Gets or sets whether CostKill is On or Off.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.QualityKill
member.summary: Gets or sets whether QualityKill is On or Off.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.Verify
member.summary: Verify implementation for the PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortBinning.PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Execute implementation for the PrimeSortTBinTestMethod.
member.returns: Exit port number.
